hero_sub: MechFlow tracks the full lifecycle of industrial machinery — assembly, testing, shipment, installation — across every client site on earth. Type-safe, real-time, built for manufacturers.
fleet_body: Track not just your machines, but the customers running them — see where every unit lives, spin the globe, and drill into any country at a glance.
fleet_hint: ↳ DRAG TO SPIN · HOVER A COUNTRY
cap_body: Everything you need to run your machines worldwide — live, on every device, with your whole team always on the same page.
feat_live_body: Every update from the production floor appears instantly. No refreshing — your whole team sees the same picture in real time.
feat_anywhere_body: Phone on the workshop floor, laptop at the office, browser anywhere — the same dashboard, always in sync.
feat_alerts_body: Get notified the second a machine needs attention — deadlines, delays and status changes reach you wherever you are.
feat_fleet_title: Your whole fleet on the map
feat_fleet_body: A live world map of every machine, customer and shipment, all at a glance.
feat_reports_body: Branded PDF reports for any machine or time period — ready to print or send.
feat_languages_body: Switch language instantly, so every team works the way they prefer.
modules_body: From the shop floor to the front office — ten connected modules, one source of truth. No spreadsheets, no scattered tools.
mod_dashboard_body: Your whole operation at a glance.
mod_machines_body: Every unit, every stage, full history.
mod_activity_body: A full audit trail of every change.
mod_announcements_body: Broadcast updates to the whole team.
mod_settings_body: Tune the platform to your plant.
roles_title: Everyone sees exactly what they should.
roles_body: Granular permissions per role, plus per-person data scoping — so a technician, a plant manager and the GM each get their own view. Use the built-in roles or design your own.
proof_quote: We went from chasing status updates across WhatsApp and spreadsheets to one live board the whole company trusts. Nothing slips through anymore.
cta_title: Put your whole fleet on MechFlow.
cta_body: Book a walkthrough with your machines and your data. We'll have you live in days, not months.
footer_tagline: Industrial machine operations — tracked from order to the factory floor, live and worldwide.
